subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! From time aforetime thy mention hath flowed forth and been made manifest from the Most Exalted Pen. I swear by the Most Great Luminary which shineth from the horizon of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد از قبل از قلم اعلی ذکرت ظاهر و جاری شد قسم بنیر اعظم که از افق عالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
